are in the next house. Rahu in Pisces in
the 3rd and the Moon in Aries in the 4th. This shows that the native may be
c enied any care from his father.
As Saturn in Leo has Mars and Ketu combination in Virgo, the native
may take up agriculture with pumpsets etc., and have some cattle wealth. By
about 24-26, he may be married and also get the village accountant's post. He
will acquire some landed property between 30-32 and build a house of his
own. Between 40 and 46-48, he will earn a good name, and will make money.
He will have four issues all ofwhom will come up very well. One son will
have poor health. The others will be quite well. At 50-52 he will celebrate
some happy functions in the house. He will overcome all enemies as there are
